description:
Welcome to our charming accommodation in Berlin-Charlottenburg! Centrally located with bus, subway and S-Bahn on the doorstep. This spacious loft has 75 square meters and offers a comfortable sleeping area and an inviting living room with flat screen, work area, dining table and sofa bed.

Quietly located in the inner courtyard, you can escape the hustle and bustle of the city and enjoy an undisturbed night's sleep. Restaurants, stores and sights are within easy walking distance.
neighborhood_overview:
The neighborhood around the apartment is enriched with cultural landmarks and bustling streets. Just a short walk away lies the renowned Kurfürstendamm, a vibrant boulevard teeming with shops, restaurants, and theaters. This iconic street offers endless opportunities for shopping and exploration.

Moreover, for those interested in the arts, the nearby opera house is a must-visit. With its rich history and world-class performances, it's a cultural gem in the heart of Berlin. After a day of sightseeing or shopping along Kurfürstendamm, catching a performance at the opera house is a delightful way to immerse oneself in Berlin's cultural scene. And with Café Reeham conveniently situated across the street, it's easy to enjoy your breakfast in the sun.

name: Welcome Home, welcome to Kant Strasse 63
description: Our spacious, warm, fully-equipped, and extremely well-connected central Berlin apartment offers an oasis of calm and period charm in this exciting and vibrant city. Its back courtyard location guarantees a good nights sleep in either the spacious master bedroom or our other bedroom with two single  beds. The living room sofa can also be pulled out if you need it, and there is a baby bed. Free Wifi, large kitchen and bathroom, washer / drier, and lovely living / dining room. You will love it.
neighborhood_overview: One of the most elegant districts in Berlin, Charlottenburg exudes old-world glamour. Named after Queen Charlotte of Prussia, it is stuffed with French-influenced architecture, stylish and ethnic / street food restaurants and cafes to suit all tastes and budgets, shopping streets, theatres, museums and peaceful parks. The area has always attracted Berliners and tourists, from celebrities, artists, and politicians who haunt the famous Paris Bar, to today's young families who have made the area their home. The iconic Kurfürstendamm - the Champs-Elysées of Berlin - runs parallel to Kant Strasse, and there is Charlottenburg Palace, the Kaiser Wilhelm Memorial church, Schiller theatre, Deutsche Opera, the list goes on and on.
host_about: Hi, we love Berlin. Although we currently live in Switzerland there is  part of us that is always in Berlin. There is so much history, and so much that is contemporary too. You get the best of both worlds. So, whatever interests you the likelihood is that you ill find it in Berlin. We would love to welcome you to our home in Berlin. We hope you'll love it a much as we do.

neighborhood_overview: This furnished apartment is located in Kreuzberg, a sprawling neighborhood in central Berlin. The dynamic and fast-growing area is popular with students, young professionals, and new arrivals to the city. You will find cafes and eateries at every price point, as well as an abundance of Turkish restaurants around Kottbusser Tor. Bergmannkiez is known for both its 19th century architecture and the cool independent stores and abundant restaurants and bars along Bergmanstrasse. Kreuzberg is home to several notable museums, including the Berlinische Gallery, the German Museum of Technology and the Jewish Museum Berlin. Other highlights include the famous Checkpoint Charlie, located along the neighborhood's northern border, and Potsdamer Platz. Kreuzberg is served by several S-Bahn, U-Bahn and bus lines.
host_about:
We’re Blueground, a global proptech company with several thousand move-in-ready apartments in a growing number of major cities around the world. With flexible terms and homes in vibrant, centrally based neighborhoods, you’ll feel at home and free to roam for as long as you want — a month, a year, or longer. 

Each apartment is thoughtfully designed with exclusive furnishings, fully equipped kitchens, and incredible amenities – making every day a five-star experience. From day one, you’ll enjoy high-speed Wi-Fi, premium linens, and smart home entertainment. Plus, access to pools, gyms, and outdoor spaces in select buildings.

Why stress over your apartment? We provide a hassle-free alternative — a consistent, quality guest experience that starts even before you arrive. Because we let you book our most up-to-date apartment listings online, confirm with a click, pay securely, and check in easily. 

During your stay
Upon arrival, you’ll either be greeted personally by a Blueground team member or given self-check-in instructions. The entire apartment is yours! You’ll enjoy reliable support via email, phone, and our Guest App, where you can request everything from a home cleaning to extra towels. 

We’ll share all details upon confirmation of your stay.

name: Well-Designed Shiny Nest in the Heart of Berlin
description: Welcome to our charming studio apartment in Prenzlauerberg, a blend of comfort and convenience, perfect for 3 guests. It features a luxurious queen bed, a versatile single sofa bed, a full kitchen, and a tranquil bathroom with a park-view bathtub. Nestled in the city's heart, enjoy easy access to Alexanderplatz and the nearest lake within a 15min metro/tram ride. Your ideal Berlin getaway awaits!
neighborhood_overview: The apartment is located in the vibrant & historic neighbourhood of Prenzlauerberg. Mauerpark, the biggest flea market in Berlin featuring the rests of the Berlin Wall, is only a walk away. Weißer See which features a sand beach is only 15min away by bike or 20min away with the tram. You will find plenty of independent stores, cafes, restaurants around the area. Most of them are situated 5min away in Stargarderstraße where you will also find Hokey-Pokey: the best ice-cream in Berlin. The oldest bakery in Berlin Siebert Bakery is a walk away while Bäcker Kroll and Hacker Bäckerei also offer authentic german breads and cakes, DDR interiors are on the house. Only a few minutes away by foot, the UNESCO World Heritage Wohnstadt Carl Legien residential block is an entire complex in early Bauhaus style dating back to the 1920.

description:
Our Zweifach Minilofts are ideal for up to 4 people. Within their 40 sqm there is a separate bedroom with a queen sized bed (160 x 200 cm), a living room with two sofas that convert into single beds, an open kitchen with a large table for working or dining, and an ensuite bathroom with a shower.

neighborhood_overview: Located on the southern end of Friedrichstraße, we are just 3 minutes walk from Checkpoint Charlie, but in quiet surroundings in front of Besselpark. The main points of interest in Berlin like the Brandenburg Gate, Reichstag and Kanzleramt, are just a few train stops away, and the vibrant districts of Kreuzberg and Bergmannkiez are right at your doorstep. Looking over the city from inside Miniloft Kreuzberg, guests have an overview of some architectural history of 20th-century Berlin: The apartment blocks from the 60s and 70s and the post-modern buildings of the Berlin IBA in 1987 including the standout residential tower by John Hejduk, the Rocket-Tower by Sauerbruch/Hutton with the "pillbox" on the east side of the building, the apartment blocks on Leipziger Strasse and the sparkling Axel Springer skyscraper. You can even see the iconic tv tower of Alexanderplatz. The location of Miniloft Kreuzberg is a bermuda triangle for architect buffs!

From the iconic remnants of the Berlin Wall to the historic Karl-Marx-Allee, the neighborhood serves as a living testament to Berlin's resilience and reinvention.

description: Feel at home wherever you choose to live with Blueground. You’ll love this stylish Charlottenburg furnished three bedroom apartment with its modern decor, fully equipped kitchen, and charming living room with great balcony views. Ideally located, you’re close to all the best that Berlin has to offer! (ID #BER136)
neighborhood_overview: This furnished apartment is located in Charlottenburg, which is set within the district of Charlottenburg-Wilmersdorf in Berlin's inner city. This elegant neighborhood is known for its historic architecture and high-end shopping scene, and there's no shortage of things to see and do nearby. Charlottenburg Palace, a Baroque castle that is now a museum, is worth a visit. Other neighborhood highlights include the Deutsche Oper Berlin and Schaubühne, a three-stage Modernist theater designed by Erich Mendelsohn. There's also the lovely Forst Grunewald, a vast greenspace located along the western border of the neighborhood. Charlottenburg is served by several U-Bahn and bus lines.
host_about:
We’re Blueground, a global proptech company with several thousand move-in-ready apartments in a growing number of major cities around the world. With flexible terms and homes in vibrant, centrally based neighborhoods, you’ll feel at home and free to roam for as long as you want — a month, a year, or longer. 

Each apartment is thoughtfully designed with exclusive furnishings, fully equipped kitchens, and incredible amenities – making every day a five-star experience. From day one, you’ll enjoy high-speed Wi-Fi, premium linens, and smart home entertainment. Plus, access to pools, gyms, and outdoor spaces in select buildings.

Why stress over your apartment? We provide a hassle-free alternative — a consistent, quality guest experience that starts even before you arrive. Because we let you book our most up-to-date apartment listings online, confirm with a click, pay securely, and check in easily. 

During your stay

host_about:
Seit 17 Jahren lebe ich in dieser wunderbaren, lebendigen, sich ständig verändernden kurz und knapp großartigen Stadt. 
Zum Studium zog mich Berlin magisch an. Dann bin ich geblieben. Mit vielen Unterbrechungen, um die Welt zu entdecken. Zu Reisen, Menschen kennenzulernen,  neue Welten und Möglichkeiten zu entdecken….das ist meine große Leidenschaft. 
Mittlerweile teile ich diese Leidenschaft mit meiner Familie, zu der meine drei großartigen und reiselustigen Kinder gehören.
So habe ich diese unglaubliche Stadt aus so vielen unterschiedlichen Blickwinkeln betrachtet-das kunterbunte aufregende Studentenleben, der Einstieg ins Berufsleben und nun mit Familie. Das Fazit nach all dieser Zeit und vielen vielen Gegenden, die ich bereist habe-ich bin immer wieder zurückgekehrt-hier ist mein zu Hause BERLIN.
Ich bin sicher euch den ein oder anderen guten Tipp geben zu können und freue mich riesig über jeden einzelnen Gast! Ich hoffe so sehr, dass ich euch all das bieten kann, was ihr euch für einen wunderbaren Aufenthalt in dieser großartigen Stadt wünscht :)

neighborhood_overview:
Berlin Mitte – The Heart of the Capital: Naturally, this part of the city, home to some of Berlin's most popular tourist attractions, is always bustling. The Brandenburg Gate, Berlin Cathedral, Reichstag, Holocaust Memorial, and the museums on Museum Island are all located within the Mitte district, making it easy to see a lot in a short amount of time. Mitte is a diverse mix of office buildings and residential complexes, and it’s home to a mix of affluent residents, both young and old, families, and singles. Although it’s a busy part of the city, it also offers a respite from the hustle and bustle, with charming attractions such as Hackescher Markt and scenic walking paths along the picturesque Spree. If you’re not afraid of heights, the iconic TV Tower at Alexanderplatz offers a rotating restaurant with breathtaking views of Berlin.

The apartment is located near many sights, including cultural highlights and venues such as theaters, museums, historic landmarks, restaurants
